name: Chiles Rellenos w/ Tomato Sauce & Avocado Salsa
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique brand Panela cheese, crumbled
12 ounces Cacique brand Manchego cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. After roasting and peeling the chilies, make a 1-inch incision on one side to remove the seeds.
2. Mix the cheeses and stuff them into the chilies.
3. Place in a warm 350ºF oven for approximately 10-15 minutes.
4. Top with avocado salsa and tomato sauce.
For Tomato Sauce:
5. Cook onions until clear.
6. Add garlic, oregano, tomatoes, and cumin; cook covered for 30 minutes on low heat.
For Avocado Salsa:
7. Mix all ingredients in a blender and puree.
